name: Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Tamari soy sauce, low sodium
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in 1/4 cup water until soft and tender.
2. Add 4 cups water (or vegetable stock) and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low.
4. Add tamari.
5. Simmer covered for at least 30 minutes before serving.
6. The longer it cooks, the more flavor it will have.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
